raw_consumer_statement:
I am requesting a goodwill review regarding a settled Barclays credit card account that continues to report negative information on my credit report. The card was used to help our children get through school. 
The account was resolved and settled, and since that time I have worked diligently to rebuild my credit and maintain positive payment history across my other accounts. 
The continued reporting of this negative item is significantly impacting my credit profile despite the account being resolved. 
I am respectfully requesting that Barclays review this account for a goodwill adjustment and consider removing the negative tradeline from my credit report. 
I appreciate your time and consideration in reviewing this request.
